nodes.name: Piping hornbill
nodes.summary: The piping hornbill (Bycanistes fistulator) is a bird in the hornbill family. This black-and-white species is found in humid forest and second growth in Central and West Africa, ranging from Senegal east to Uganda and south to Angola. At about 50 cm (20 in) in length, it is the smallest member of the genus Bycanistes. Gallery References External links Piping hornbill, sound recordings, xeno-canto
